overview.text: The NSW National Parks and Wildlife Service manages more than 870 national parks, nature reserves and historic sites covering around 7.5 million hectares — about 9% of NSW. NPWS is a major fire-fighting agency and the lead manager for park-based emergencies and search-and-rescue.

items: Field staff trained as remote-area firefighters and as Park Rangers.
Hazard-reduction burning and fire suppression alongside RFS and Forestry Corporation.
Pest, weed and threatened-species management programs.
Coordinates with NSW Police Rescue and SES for park search and rescue.
